summary: Well-organized Pester test suite that covers all four core functions (Get-Dependencies, Test-LicenseStatus, Invoke-LicenseCheck, Format-ComplianceReport) with proper fixtures using $TestDrive. All stated requirements are tested: manifest parsing, dependency extraction, allow/deny classification, mock license lookup, and report generation. However, rigor is limited by gaps in error handling (malformed JSON not tested), missing explicit test for deny-list precedence over allow-list, and incomplete boundary testing (whitespace-only licenses, special characters, large datasets). The act harness integration testing complements unit tests well. Test naming is clear and BeforeAll setup is proper. Would catch most regressions in the happy path and common scenarios, but gaps in error case coverage reduce confidence in production robustness.
